DeckNForge — Wizard / Band Record Print 2 sheets per band — one for the box, one for the wizard.

DeckNForge

Band Record · Wizard Ledger

Band Identity

The Six Monsters

Built once at band creation. Pick a creature label, draw 3 Items, HP = sum, ATK = ⌈avg ÷ 2⌉. Two same-rank Items = ⭐ Legend.

Card Name HP ATK ⭐ Labels (max 5 lifetime)
A♠
A♥
A♣
A♦
Joker B
Joker R

Blessed Cards (Inscriptions)

1 inscription per card max. Mythic only on Heroes. Cross out faded inscriptions; the card is unblessed until re-inscribed.

Card Inscription Tier Faded?

Dungeon Log

Record the date, who held the band, and the outcome.

DateWizardResultGlory

Drift History

Wizards who have held this band, in order.

#WizardNotes

2

4
